title: Task 2: Frontend types + color palettes + store

inputs.description: Read docs/superpowers/plans/2026-03-27-network-map-readability.md — Task 2. In frontend/src/types/network.ts: add primary_role to MapNode, add ColorByMode type, add CENTURY_COLORS/ROLE_COLORS/OCCUPATION_COLORS palettes, add getCenturyLabel() and getAgentColor() helper functions. In frontend/src/stores/networkStore.ts: add colorBy state and setColorBy action, default 'century'. Verify: cd frontend && npx tsc --noEmit. Commit.
